message.content:
@startuml
actor Client

participant "RegisterClientUI" as UI
participant "RegisterClientController" as Controller
participant "ApplicationPOT" as AppPOT
participant "app\nApplicationPOT" as AppPOT2
participant "EncryptPassword" as EncryptPassword
participant "EmailSender" as EmailSender
participant "DataHandler" as DataHandler

Client -> UI : 1 Engages the register feature/button
UI -> Client : Asks for all the information required\nfor the register (i.e. name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,\nstreetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,\nCCV)
Client -> UI : 3 Fills all the information required
UI -> Client : 4 Presents the data and asks for a confirmation
Client -> UI : 5 Confirms

UI -> Controller : 6 registerNewClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

Controller -> AppPOT : 7 create()

AppPOT -> AppPOT2 : 8 create()

note right of AppPOT2
clientService
ClientService
end note

note right of AppPOT2
clientDB
ClientDB
end note

AppPOT -> Controller : 9 validateInput(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

alt [if all the information given as input has a valid format]

Controller -> AppPOT : 10 newClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

AppPOT -> AppPOT2 : 11 create(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

note right of AppPOT2
client
Client
end note

AppPOT2 -> AppPOT2 : 12 create(email,password,nif,name)

note right of AppPOT2
user
:User
end note

AppPOT2 -> EncryptPassword : 13 encryptPasswordMD5(password)

AppPOT2 -> AppPOT2 : 14 create(latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country)

note right of AppPOT2 : Address

AppPOT2 -> AppPOT2 : 15 create(creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

note right of AppPOT2 : CreditCard

Controller -> AppPOT : 16 registerNewClient(client)

AppPOT -> AppPOT2 : 17 addClientToDB(client)

note over AppPOT2
ref
SD_CONNECTIONS
end note

AppPOT2 -> EmailSender : 18 sendEmail(email,subject,body)

Controller -> Client : 19 Validates and informs about the success of the operation

else [if any information does not have a valid format]

UI -> Client : 20 Informs the User that the operation\nwas not successful

end

@enduml
